content: Hey there! I'm Rowan, been driving trucks for over 40 years now. Just got back from visiting my daughter in Portland last week.
Hello Rowan! That's quite a career in trucking. How was your visit to Portland? Did you get to see any of the city while you were there?
Portland was great! My daughter Sarah just had her second child, so I finally got to meet my new grandson Liam. He's a little bundle of joy.
Congratulations on the new grandson! That must have been wonderful to meet him. How old is Liam now?
He's about 6 months old now. Sarah says he's already trying to crawl. I brought them some honey from my beehives - figured it's good for the whole family.
That's such a thoughtful gift! Honey from your own beehives must be special. How many hives do you keep these days?
I've got 12 hives right now. It's become a real passion of mine in the last decade. Between that and my speedcubing hobby, I stay pretty busy when I'm not on the road.
Speedcubing? That's the Rubik's cube solving, right? How did you get into that?
Yeah, Rubik's cube solving. My grandson Ethan, Sarah's oldest, got me into it about 3 years ago. Now I can solve it in under 30 seconds. Trying to get faster for the competition next month.
Under 30 seconds is impressive! You mentioned a competition - is that part of your triathlon training?

Oh no, the competition is a speedcubing championship in Seattle. The triathlon is a separate thing - I'm doing it with my brother Marcus. We're both turning 65 next year and wanted to do something big together.
